0.q: overexpression of Scdr1 in transgenic tobacco plants increased their tolerance to drought, salinity and oxidative stress, as demonstrated by increased photosynthesis, water content, biomass, germination rate, chlorophyll content and reduced accumulation of ROS.

1.q: Higher levels of Scdr2 enhanced resilience to salinity and drought, and this protection correlated with reduced oxidative damage... reduced accumulation of hydrogen peroxide in the leaves

2.q: ethylene-responsive factors (ERFs) that act at the last step of ethylene signaling pathways... Like other ERF transcription factors, the SodERF3 protein binds to the GCC box.
